howItWorks.intro: This pet medication dosage calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: Can I use human medication for pets?
faq.a: Some human medications are safe for pets at proper doses, but always consult your vet first.

faq.q: What if the dose is between tablet sizes?
faq.a: Ask your vet about splitting tablets or using liquid formulations.
